Bash(python -c " import json, re, sys def find_english_keys\(obj\): eng_keys = [] if isinstance\(obj, dict\): for k, v in obj.items\(\): if re.search\(r'[a-zA-Z]', k\): eng_keys.append\(k\) eng_keys.extend\(find_english_keys\(v\)\) elif isinstance\(obj, list\): for item in obj: eng_keys.extend\(find_english_keys\(item\)\) return eng_keys import os base = 'D:/pythonProject/v9work/output/industry_standard/SN544-1/' for fname in os.listdir\(base\): if fname.endswith\('.json'\): with open\(base + fname, encoding='utf-8'\) as f: data = json.load\(f\) eng = sorted\(set\(find_english_keys\(data\)\)\) bad = [x for x in ['_llm_backend','_llm_error'] if x in data] top = list\(data.keys\(\)\) sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('FILE:' + fname + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\) sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('TOP:' + repr\(top\) + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\) sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('ENG:' + repr\(eng\) + '\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\) sys.stdout.buffer.write\(\('BAD:' + repr\(bad\) + '\\n---\\n'\).encode\('utf-8'\)\) ")
